description: CompositionBlue jeans with a washed look, made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidered detailing, comfortable waistband with belt loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back, and a button and zipper closureFitSlim fitWash careWash inside out separately in mild detergentDo not bleachDry in shadeThe manually treated denim with the heavy washed look adds unique styling to this pair of blue jeans from spykar, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day and stretches well to accommodate your body movements. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers.Model statisticsProduct is a size 32 on a model of height 5'8& rdquo and waist 28"The belt is not included
